failed_attempts:
let rec f_nat (n : ℕ) : ℕ :=
    if n ≤ 1 then 1
    else if n = 3 then 3
    else if n % 2 = 0 then f_nat (n / 2)
    else if n % 4 = 1 then
      let k := n / 4
      2 * f_nat (2 * k + 1) - f_nat k
    else
      let k := n / 4
      3 * f_nat (2 * k + 1) - 2 * f_nat k
    termination_by n
    decreasing_by all_goals omega

  have f_eq (n : ℕ+) : f n = f_nat n := by
    apply PNat.strongInductionOn n; intro k ih
    rw [f_nat]
    split_ifs with h_le h_3 h_even h_mod1
    · have : k = 1 := by apply PNat.eq; simpa using h_le
      subst this; rw [h₀]; rfl
    · have : k = 3 := by apply PNat.eq; exact h_3
      subst this; rw [h₁]; rfl
    · have m : ℕ+ := ⟨(k : ℕ) / 2, by
        have : k = 2 * ((k : ℕ) / 2) := Nat.eq_mul_of_div_eq_right (Nat.dvd_of_mod_eq_zero h_even) rfl
        have : k ≠ 0 := PNat.ne_zero k
        omega⟩
      have : k = 2 * m := by apply PNat.eq; simp; exact Nat.eq_mul_of_div_eq_right (Nat.dvd_of_mod_eq_zero h_even) rfl
      rw [this, h₂, ih m]; simp; omega
    · have m : ℕ+ := ⟨(k : ℕ) / 4, by
        have : k = 4 * ((k : ℕ) / 4) + 1 := Nat.div_add_mod k 4 ▸ h_mod1 ▸ rfl
        have : k ≠ 1 := by intro h; subst h; simp at h_le
        omega⟩
      have : k = 4 * m + 1 := by apply PNat.eq; simp; omega
      rw [this] at h_mod1 ⊢
      rw [ih (2*m+1), ih m] <;> try { simp; omega }
      apply Nat.eq_sub_of_add_eq
      rw [add_comm]
      norm_cast
      rw [h₃]
    · have m : ℕ+ := ⟨(k : ℕ) / 4, by
        have : k = 4 * ((k : ℕ) / 4) + 3 := Nat.div_add_mod k 4 ▸ (by omega)
        have : k ≠ 3 := by intro h; subst h; simp at h_3
        omega⟩
      have : k = 4 * m + 3 := by apply PNat.eq; simp; omega
      rw [this] at h_mod1 ⊢
      rw [ih (2*m+1), ih m] <;> try { simp; omega }
      apply Nat.eq_sub_of_add_eq
      rw [add_comm]
      norm_cast
      rw [h₄]

  let S_nat := (Finset.Icc 1 1988).filter (λ x => f_nat x = x)
  have h_card : S_nat.card = 92 := by decide
  rw [← h_card, ← Finset.card_map ⟨(↑), PNat.coe_injective⟩, Set.ncard_coe_Finset]
  congr
  ext n
  simp [S_nat, Finset.mem_map, Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_Icc]
  constructor
  · rintro ⟨a, ⟨⟨h_ge, h_le⟩, h_eq⟩, h_n⟩
    subst h_n
    exact ⟨h_le, by rw [← h_eq, f_eq]⟩
  · intro ⟨h_le, h_eq⟩
    refine ⟨n, ⟨⟨n.2, h_le⟩, ?_⟩, rfl⟩
    rw [f_eq, h_eq]
